assertion_results.text: The changelog identifies the release as a minor version bump (v1.9.0) because the highest-impact commits are features
assertion_results.evidence: Output header says '## Changes' with no version number or SemVer classification. No mention of minor/major/patch.

assertion_results.text: Commits are grouped under category headings (Features, Bug Fixes, Performance, Dependencies) rather than a flat bullet list
assertion_results.evidence: All 15 commits listed as a flat bullet list under a single '## Changes' heading with no categorization.

assertion_results.text: All three feature commits appear under a Features heading with their scope and PR links
assertion_results.evidence: Feature commits are present but mixed in with all other commits in a flat list. No Features heading.

assertion_results.text: All five bug fix commits appear under a Bug Fixes heading with scope, description, and PR links
assertion_results.evidence: Bug fix commits present in the flat list but no Bug Fixes heading or grouping.

assertion_results.text: Both performance commits appear under a Performance heading
assertion_results.evidence: Performance commits present in the flat list but no Performance heading.

assertion_results.text: Dependency bumps are grouped under a Dependencies heading showing old and new versions
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency commits listed as raw commit messages 'chore(deps): bump axios from 1.6.2 to 1.7.0' with no Dependencies heading.

assertion_results.text: PR links are formatted as clickable Markdown links pointing to https://github.com/acme/node-sdk/pull/NNN
assertion_results.evidence: PR numbers shown as raw text (#312) with no Markdown link formatting.

assertion_results.text: A compare link is included showing the full diff between v1.8.0 and v1.9.0
assertion_results.evidence: A compare link is present at the bottom: https://github.com/acme/node-sdk/compare/v1.8.0...v1.9.0
